idea-plugin.name: Claude Code Panel
idea-plugin.description:
A graphical Claude Code chat panel for Android Studio and IntelliJ-based IDEs, inspired by the VS Code Claude Code experience. It drives your locally installed claude CLI over its streaming-JSON protocol and renders the conversation — streaming replies, extended thinking, tool calls, edits, and results — in a native Swing tool window with message bubbles and a Claude Code-style composer.

Requires the Claude Code CLI to be installed (the claude command). This plugin is an independent wrapper and is not affiliated with Anthropic.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.6.0 — New Agent Activity Map: replaces the generic "Thinking…" indicator with a live, force-directed graph of what Claude is observably touching — files, searches, commands, Gradle tasks, tests, errors and generated patches — grouped into architectural clusters, with a current-focus card, clickable node details (open/reveal in the IDE), and an activity timeline. Choose a Chat, Split or Map-only layout from the header. Observable activity only; it makes no claim to reveal hidden reasoning.
0.1.0 — Initial release: streaming chat panel, extended-thinking & tool-call rendering, edit/diff previews, model & permission-mode selectors, and session resume.
